name: @qf-jarvis/event-ingestion
description: QF Jarvis event-ingestion trust boundary. Stage 3.2 provides pure, synchronous Ed25519 signature verification and a public-key registry; Stage 3.3 slice 1 adds a pure, database-free semantic-digest foundation (deterministic canonical JSON + SHA-256), and slice 2 adds pure, database-free validated-event preparation (verified body → strict UTF-8 → JSON → contract validation → frozen snapshot + digest). Both are compiled INTERNALLY and not publicly exported — only a later validated-ingestion composition may call them. Still no database, no ingest function, no persistence. node:crypto plus the data-only @qf-jarvis/contracts (its transitive zod is used for validation only); no direct zod dependency or import.
